folio.label: 205v
folio.l: Rysalger , and oure matiers embityngö
And eke of oure matiers , encorporyngö
And of oure siluer , citrynaciou~
And of cementynge , and fermentaciou~
Oure Ingottes , testes , & manye moo
I wil ©ow telle , as was me taugút also
The foure spiritez , & the bodies seuene
By ordre , as ofte I herd my lord nemene
The first spirit , quyk siluer called is
The Secund Orpement , the thridde I wys
Sal Armonyak , and the ferthe Bremstou~
The bodyes seuene eke , lo hem heere a noon
Sol , gold is , and Luna siluer we threpe
Mars Iren , Mercurie quyksiluä we clepe
Saturnus led , and Iuppiter is Tyn
And venus Coper , by my fader kyn
This cursed craft , who so wil excersise
He shal no good haue , æ hi~ may suffise
For al the good , he spendetú there a boute
He lese shal , ther of haue I no doute
Who so æat listetú , outren , his folie
Lat hi~ come fortú , and lerne multiplie
And euäy man , æ hatú ougút in his cofre
Lat hi~ appiere , and wexe a Philosophre
Ascauns that craft , is so ligút to lere
Nay nay god wot , al be he Monke or frere
Preest or Chanou~ , or any other wygút
Thougú he sitte at his book , bothe day & nygút
In lernynge , of this eluyssú , nyce lore
Al is in veyn , and perde mechel more
To lerne a lewed man , this subtilitee
Fy , spek nat ther of , for it wil nat be
And cone he letterure , or cone he noon
As in effect he shal fynde it al oon
For bothe xxo , by my sauaciou~

note.notetxt: double check 128/9 the MS is damaged here. /ODR/

folio.l: Concluden , in multiplicaciou~
I like wel , whan they han al I do
This is to seyn , they faillen bothe two
ñet forgat I , to makee rehersail
Of watres Corosif´ , and of lymail
And of bodies , mollificaciou~
And also , of here induraciou~
